tools.name: macos_calendar_list
tools.description: List Apple Calendar events in a date range.

to.description: End date YYYY-MM-DD (default: 7 days from start)

tools.name: macos_calendar_create
tools.description: Create a calendar event. Adds 1-day and 1-hour alerts automatically.

tools.name: macos_calendar_delete
tools.description: Delete calendar events by title and date.

tools.name: macos_calendar_update
tools.description: Update an existing calendar event by ID.

tools.name: macos_calendar_reload
tools.description: Force Calendar to refresh from iCloud / CalDAV sources.

tools.name: macos_reminders_done
tools.description: Mark a reminder as complete by ID.

tools.name: macos_reminders_uncomplete
tools.description: Mark a reminder as not complete.

tools.name: macos_contacts_search
tools.description: Search contacts by name, phone, or email.

tools.name: macos_contacts_update
tools.description: Update fields on an existing contact.

tools.name: macos_contacts_get_note
tools.description: Read the note field of a contact.

tools.name: macos_contacts_set_note
tools.description: Write the note field of a contact.

tools.name: macos_notes_read
tools.description: Read a note's full content by title.

tools.name: macos_notes_delete
tools.description: Delete a note by title (partial match, first match).

tools.name: macos_notes_update
tools.description: Update a note's title and/or body.

tools.name: macos_mail_draft
tools.description: Create a draft email in Apple Mail.

tools.name: macos_mail_send
tools.description: Send an email immediately via Mail.

tools.name: macos_mail_read
tools.description: Read full message content for messages matching a query.

tools.name: macos_mail_reply
tools.description: Reply to a message matching a query.

tools.name: macos_mail_refresh
tools.description: Force Mail to check all accounts now.

tools.name: macos_mail_mailboxes
tools.description: List all mailboxes across Mail accounts.

tools.name: macos_screen_capture
tools.description: Take a screenshot (legacy alias; prefer screenshot tools).

tools.name: macos_screenshot_full
tools.description: Capture the full screen to a PNG.

tools.name: macos_ocr_full
tools.description: OCR the entire screen using Vision.

tools.name: macos_pdf_text
tools.description: Extract text from a PDF file.

tools.description: Get text content of current Safari tab.

tools.name: macos_safari_execute
tools.description: Execute JavaScript in the current Safari tab.

tools.name: macos_safari_new_tab
tools.description: Open a new Safari tab at a URL.

sound.description: default, Hero, Ping, Purr, Sosumi, etc.

tools.name: macos_speech_say
tools.description: Speak text aloud using a macOS voice.

tools.name: macos_info_power_caffeinate
tools.description: Prevent sleep for N seconds (0 = indefinite).

tools.name: macos_spaces_switch
tools.description: Switch to a space by 1-based index.

tools.name: macos_audio_set_output
tools.description: Set the default audio output device.

tools.name: macos_audio_set_input
tools.description: Set the default audio input device.

tools.name: macos_script_run
tools.description: Execute JXA or AppleScript and return the result.

tools.name: macos_timemachine_status
tools.description: Show backup status and last-backup time.

tools.name: macos_timemachine_start
tools.description: Start a Time Machine backup immediately.

tools.name: macos_timemachine_stop
tools.description: Cancel a running Time Machine backup.

tools.name: macos_menu_list
tools.description: List top-level menu items for an app.

tools.name: macos_menu_click
tools.description: Click a menu item by path (e.g. 'View > Show Sidebar').

tools.name: macos_mouse_drag
tools.description: Click and drag from (from_x, from_y) to (to_x, to_y).

tools.name: macos_mouse_scroll
tools.description: Scroll at position (positive = up, negative = down).

tools.name: macos_keyboard_type
tools.description: Type text into the frontmost app.

tools.description: Find UI elements matching a name.

tools.name: macos_ax_click
tools.description: Click a UI element by name.

tools.name: macos_ax_read
tools.description: Dump the UI tree of an app (top 2 levels).

tools.name: macos_ax_hints
tools.description: List interactive UI elements with hint numbers.

tools.name: macos_window_list
tools.description: List visible windows with positions and sizes.

tools.description: Bring a window to the front.

tools.description: Toggle fullscreen for an app window.

tools.description: Expand a window to fill the visible screen area.

tools.name: macos_window_snap
tools.description: Snap a window to a screen region.

tools.name: macos_photos_add_to_album
tools.description: Add a photo to an album.

tools.description: Delete photo(s) from the library (default limit 1).

tools.description: Get or set Music app volume (0-100).

tools.description: Search Music library; plays the first result.

tools.name: macos_music_add_to_playlist
tools.description: Add a track to a playlist.

tools.description: Open a file or folder in Finder.

tools.description: Read or write Finder color tags.

tools.description: Navigate front Finder window to a directory.

tools.description: Toggle or check Finder's 'Show hidden files' setting.

tools.description: Show current Focus mode and DND state.

tools.description: Enable Do Not Disturb (or a specific Focus mode).

tools.description: Kill a process by PID or name.

tools.description: Detailed info for a disk or volume.

tools.description: Mount a disk image or volume.

tools.description: Move a file or folder to Trash.

tools.description: Move or rename a file or directory.
